description: FeatureCollection wrapper for the gsmscimlBasic BB. Combines json-fg/featurecollection.json with per-item dispatch via gsmscimlBasicFeature.json. Recognised featureType values for items: AnthropogenicGeomorphologicFeature, Contact, Fold, Foliation, GeologicEvent, GeologicUnit, MappedFeature, NaturalGeomorphologicFeature, ShearDisplacementStructure.
